title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 337.515 - License expiration, renewal, fees
text:
337.515.  License expiration, renewal, fees. — Each license issued pursuant to the provisions of sections 337.500 to 337.540 shall expire on the renewal date. The division shall renew any license upon application for renewal and upon payment of the fee established by the committee pursuant to the provisions of section 337.507.
(L. 1985 S.B. 37 § 5, A.L. 1989 H.B. 738 & 720)
